subject: [PATCH v7 2/2] mm: use mapping_max_folio_order() for force_thp_readahead order

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Identified a good solution to improve performance on certain configurations by allowing VM_HUGEPAGE mappings to use a larger readahead size. Suggested adding Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>.

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch modifies the force_thp_readahead path in do_sync_mmap_readahead() to use mapping_max_folio_order() for mappings that support large folios, capping the order at 2M. This change is intended to improve performance on certain configurations by allowing VM_HUGEPAGE mappings to use a larger readahead size.
